generated_oml:
// C1: Acting Components (Motor-Gearbox System)
instance MotorGearboxActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "The first vertical axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot's motor-gearbox subsystem comprising permanent magnet synchronous motor, cycloidal gearbox, and gear transmission"
]

// C2: Physical Sensing Components
instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Directly mounted position encoder on the motor shaft measuring rotational position with high precision"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorEncoderData
]

instance GearboxEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary position encoder mounted behind the gearbox measuring output rotational position to reduce positional uncertainty via encoder difference analysis"
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearboxEncoderData
]

instance CurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Input current sensor measuring motor phase current (I_M) for friction analysis and torque derivation"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CurrentSensorData
]

// C3: Data Transmission Components
instance MotorEncoderData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance GearboxEncoderData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxEncoder
]

instance CurrentSensorData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CurrentSensor
]

instance DerivedTorqueData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CurrentSensorData
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoderData
    base:desc "Derived torque data calculated from input current and encoder positions using manufacturer-specific torque constants"
]

instance AngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoderData
    base:desc "Calculated angular velocity data from encoder position measurements"
]

instance AccelerationData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom AngularVelocityData
    base:desc "Calculated angular acceleration data from velocity measurements"
]

// C4: Data Storage/Processing Components
instance MeasuredData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time stream of sensor data (I_M, output angle, derived torque, angular velocity, acceleration) transmitted via MQTT protocol"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderData, GearboxEncoderData, CurrentSensorData, DerivedTorqueData, AngularVelocityData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTProtocol
]

instance SimulatedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated motor output (ωr_M), gearwheel output (ωr_G), and system output (ωr_out) generated by MATLAB Simulink models"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SimulationOutputData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance SimulationOutputData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Combined simulated data traces from frictionless and friction-inclusive MATLAB Simulink models"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

// C5: Modeling Components
instance MotorModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink model representing frictionless motor dynamics with Coulomb-Viscous friction components"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance GearboxModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink model representing cycloidal gearbox dynamics with Coulomb-Viscous friction components"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance CycloidalGearboxModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink model representing complete cycloidal gearbox system dynamics including Stribeck, Dahl, and LuGre friction models"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance FrictionAnalysisModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Comprehensive MATLAB Simulink model combining all friction models (Coulomb-Viscous, Stribeck, Dahl, LuGre) for real-time friction characterization"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance SysMLBDD : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram representing the first axis as composition of Motor, Gearwheel, and CycloidalGearbox with flow definitions for rotational and current energy"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLTool
]

instance SysMLIBD : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Internal Block Diagram detailing internal structure of the motor-gearbox subsystem with flow definitions for torque/velocity and current energy"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLTool
]

// C6: Enablers/Tools
instance SysMLTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML modeling tool used for structural and behavioral modeling (BDD/IBD) of the robot's first axis"
    DTDFVocab:enables SysMLBDD, SysMLIBD
]

instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks MATLAB Simulink used for executable simulation models of robot dynamics and friction components"
    DTDFVocab:enables MotorModel, GearboxModel, CycloidalGearboxModel, FrictionAnalysisModel
]

instance MQTTProtocol : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol enabling real-time sensor data streaming from Siemens SINUMERIK 840D CNC controller to digital twin"
    DTDFVocab:enables MeasuredData
]

instance SiemensSINUMERIKController : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D CNC controller providing position, speed, and acceleration control inputs and torque/current outputs"
    DTDFVocab:enables MeasuredData
]

instance CustomDashboard : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Custom visualization dashboard providing unified visualization of data traces and model outputs for operational insights"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataVisualizationService
]

// C7: Services
instance FrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time identification service for static, kinetic, and viscous friction components using combined white-box (analytical) and black-box (data-driven) models"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionCharacterizationInsight, ModelValidationInsight
]

instance ModelValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous comparison service between simulated friction models and live sensor data to validate model accuracy and detect deviations"
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelAccuracyInsight
]

instance DataVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Unified visualization service for data traces (input current, torque, angular velocity) and model outputs in a custom dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:provides DashboardAnalyticsInsight
]

instance DynamicModelUpdateService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time updating service for friction models based on operational data to account for wear, load variations, or environmental factors"
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelAdaptationAction
]

// C8: Insights/Actions
instance FrictionCharacterizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time identification of friction components (static, kinetic, viscous) to optimize control algorithms for improved motion accuracy"
]

instance ModelValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Continuous comparison results showing deviations between simulated and actual system behavior for model accuracy assessment"
]

instance ModelAccuracyInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visual representation of model accuracy metrics (torque/velocity deviations) to inform operators about system health"
]

instance DashboardAnalyticsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visualization of data traces (torque/velocity deviations) enabling operators to identify control adjustments needed"
]

instance ModelAdaptationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic real-time updating of friction models based on operational data to improve motion accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

// C9: Environment Components
instance RobotAxisEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains MotorGearboxActuator
]

instance SensorNetworkEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains MotorEncoder, GearboxEncoder, CurrentSensor
]

instance DataProcessingEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains MeasuredData, SimulatedData
]

instance ControlSystemEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains SiemensSINUMERIKController, MATLABSimulink, CustomDashboard
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The twinning time scale is **real-time and event-driven**:
  - **Data acquisition frequency**: Sensor data (I_M, angle, torque, velocity) is streamed in near-real-time via MQTT, with timestamps included for traceability.
  - **Model update frequency**: Friction models are dynamically refined during operation, with updates triggered by deviations between simulated and measured data (e.g., during robot motion cycles).
  - **Synchronization**: The digital shadow processes data in lockstep with the robot’s operational cycle (e.g., machining tasks), ensuring alignment between physical and virtual states."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The digital twin constellation is **single-component**:
  - A **standalone digital shadow** for the first axis of the MABI MAX 100 robot, incorporating:
    - **Asset (Mabi)**: The robot’s first axis (motor-gearbox subsystem).
    - **Purpose**: Understanding friction loss and improving motion accuracy via continuous model validation.
    - **Data sources**: Physical sensors (encoders, current) and simulation models.
    - **No external DTs or horizontal integration** mentioned; the shadow operates in isolation for this use case."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The digital twin operates primarily during the **operational phase** of the robot:
  - **As operated**: The focus is on real-time friction modeling and motion accuracy improvement during active machining tasks.
  - **No explicit stages for design/manufacture**: The digital shadow is created post-deployment to analyze operational behavior, with no mention of pre-deployment design or manufacturing phases."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity considerations include:
  - **Verification/Validation**:
    - **Sensor calibration**: Encoder differences reduce positional uncertainty by accounting for gearbox elasticity/friction.
    - **Model validation**: Comparison of simulated friction models (e.g., LuGre) with live sensor data to detect deviations.
  - **Uncertainty/Errors**:
    - Friction models (e.g., Coulomb-Viscous) assume ideal conditions; real-world wear, load variations, or temperature changes may introduce errors.
    - **Traceability**: Metadata (e.g., timestamps, sensor channels) ensures accountability for data provenance and model inputs."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The technical connection details include:
  - **Data transmission**: MQTT protocol for real-time sensor data streaming from the Siemens SINUMERIK 840D CNC controller to the digital shadow.
  - **Model integration**: Asset Administration Shell (AAS) principles for structured modeling of the robot’s structure and behavior.
  - **Simulation linkage**: MathWorks MATLAB Simulink models communicate with the digital shadow via executable interfaces for friction analysis."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The digital twin adheres to:
  - **SysML** for structural and behavioral modeling.
  - **MathWorks MATLAB Simulink** for simulation models.
  - **MQTT** for real-time data communication.
  - **Asset Administration Shell (AAS)** principles for modeling the robot’s physical structure and behavior."
]
